# ORACHITECH

ORACHITECH, also known as Orachi Tech, is a software house in Pakistan.

Website: https://www.orachitech.com
Email: info@orachitech.com
Phone: +92 323 359 3780
Location: Lahore, Pakistan

## Services

- Custom software development
- Web application development
- SaaS product development
- School management system development
- Mobile app development
- Cloud solutions
- UI/UX design
- IT consulting

## Key Product

ORACHITECH provides a school management system for schools, academies, and education businesses. It includes student records, fee management, attendance tracking, exams and results, parent portal, admin dashboard, and reporting.

## Content Focus

The website publishes practical software guidance for growing businesses, schools, academies, and organizations deciding how to modernize operations. Current content covers school management SaaS, custom software versus off-the-shelf SaaS, software project case studies, web applications, SaaS development, ERP workflows, dashboards, automation, and digital transformation.
